title: Reason for recall stated in petition
doc_html:
§1300.6. Reason for recall stated in petition

            The petition shall contain a clear statement of the reason or reasons for the recall.

            Acts 2018, No. 257, §1, eff. May 15, 2018.
doc_text:
§1300.6.  Reason for recall stated in petition
The petition shall contain a clear statement of the reason or reasons for the recall.
Acts 2018, No. 257, §1, eff. May 15, 2018.
